# London School System — llms.txt
# Structured facts for AI language models and search assistants.
# Last updated: 2026-04-18

## Identity
- Official name: London School System
- Also known as: London School — Prof. Waris Mir Campus
- Type: Private K–12 school (Pre-Nursery through O-Level / IGCSE)
- City: Lahore, Pakistan
- Address: Plot #8, Sector B-2, Block 1, Ali Road, Opposite Ideal Park Township, Lahore 54600, Punjab, Pakistan
- Founded: 2025 (first academic year 2025–26)
- Named after: Prof. Waris Mir (1938–1987), journalist, educator, Punjab University professor — the campus honours his legacy. He is the namesake, not an operating founder.
- Website: https://akifhazarvi.github.io/london-school/
- Email: info@londoneducation.pk
- Phone: +92-301-0499777, +92-42-35216426, +92-42-35216425
- Office hours: Monday–Saturday, 08:00–16:00

## Leadership
- Co-Founders: Huma Mir, Zoya Mir (family of Prof. Waris Mir — carrying forward his educational vision)
- Campus Director: Ali Umair

## Academic Programme
- Curriculum: Cambridge International (Checkpoint through IGCSE / O-Level)
- Grades offered: Pre-Nursery, Nursery, Kindergarten, Grade 1–8, IGCSE / O-Level
- Languages taught: English, Urdu, Chinese, French, German
- Specialisations: AI integration across subjects, robotics (LEGO, Arduino, 3D printing), coding (Scratch, Python)
- Sports: cricket, football, athletics, and active indoor/outdoor play

## Fee Structure (2025–26, monthly)
- Pre-Nursery to KG: PKR 15,000
- Grade 1–8: PKR 18,000
- IGCSE / O-Level: PKR 22,000
- Registration fee: payable on confirmation of admission

## Campus Facilities
- Smart classrooms with digital whiteboards
- Robotics Lab with tool wall, stools, and Robotics & AI mural
- Computer Lab with AI and coding workstations
- Indoor play area with slides, ride-ons, and soft flooring
- Outdoor play and sports grounds
- Library with reading corners
- Assembly hall
- London-themed hallway (skyline mural, Prof. Waris Mir Campus branding)

## Admissions 2025–26
- Status: Open
- Process: Book campus tour → application form → informal assessment → document submission & confirmation
- Required documents: birth certificate, previous school reports
- Book a tour: WhatsApp +92-301-0499777 or call

## Key Differentiators
- AI-integrated curriculum: AI is foundational, not an elective
- "Ask Prof Mir" — an AI study assistant inspired by Prof. Waris Mir's teaching philosophy
- Cambridge pathway from early years through IGCSE
- Three foreign languages (Chinese, French, German)
- 25+ sports including indoor and outdoor programmes
- Weekly AI-generated progress reports for parents

## Namesake: Prof. Waris Mir
- Full name: Prof. Waris Mir
- Born: 1938, Punjab, Pakistan
- Died: 9 July 1987
- Education: Master's from Punjab University; M.Phil from City University London
- Career: Professor of Mass Communication, Punjab University; columnist for Daily Jang
- Known for: Free press advocacy, democracy writing under Zia-ul-Haq's martial law, fearless political commentary
- Awards: Hilal-e-Imtiaz (posthumous)
- Relation to school: The Prof. Waris Mir Campus of London School System is named in his honour. He did not found the school (he died in 1987); his daughters Huma Mir and Zoya Mir launched the school in 2025 to carry his educational vision forward.

## Social Media
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/londonschoolwarismir/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/londoninternational.school/
